webservice.description: YinYang local service status check — returns queue_size and notification counts (used to confirm YinYang service is live before chat)

outputs.queue_size: integer — number of pending notifications in queue
outputs.notifications: array — list of pending notification objects

guarantees: Always returns HTTP 200 when service is running
Always has notifications field (array, may be empty)
Response time < 2s (in-memory queue, no LLM in path)

evidence_notes: Tests /api/yinyang/status as proxy for YinYang service liveness. Elisabeth Hendrickson: the delight layer must be alive before it can delight. queue_size confirms notification pipeline is running.
